summary: Tested Distributor Billing & Reconciliation module - All features working correctly. Backend APIs (14/14 tests pass) and Frontend UI fully functional. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in create_reconciliation endpoint.

issues: Missing DialogContent aria-describedby attribute (accessibility warning in console)

details: Billing & Reconciliation tab appears after Settlements tab in distributor detail page
Base Prices Configured count displayed
Unreconciled Deliveries count displayed
Net Balance with Payable label displayed
Pending Credit Notes amount displayed
Table shows SKU, Base Price, Margin %, Transfer Price, Status, Actions
Transfer Price correctly calculated: base_price × (1 - margin_percent/100)
Example: Base=₹100, Margin=2.5% → Transfer=₹97.5 ✓
Add Base Price button opens dialog
Add Base Price dialog has: SKU selector, Base Price input, Margin % input, Remarks, Save/Cancel buttons
Table shows Reconciliation #, Period, Deliveries, Provisional, Actual Net, Difference, Status, Actions
Status badges: Draft (gray), Confirmed (blue)
View button opens reconciliation detail dialog
New Reconciliation button opens create dialog
Period Start/End date pickers
Calculate Preview button
Remarks field
Create Reconciliation button
Shows: Period, Total Deliveries, Total Quantity, Settlement Type
Shows: Provisional Amount, Actual Gross, Entitled Margin (2.5%), Final Difference
Line items table: Delivery, Account, SKU, Qty, Transfer Price, Actual Price, Difference
Business logic verified: negative difference = Credit Note (Nyla owes distributor)
Confirming draft reconciliation generates Debit/Credit Note
Settlement type determined by difference sign: positive=Debit, negative=Credit
Table shows Note #, Type, Amount, Paid, Balance, Status, Date, Actions
Type badges: Credit Note (green)
Status badges: Pending, Partially Paid, Paid
Shows Type, From Reconciliation, Total Amount, Paid Amount, Balance
Payment Reference displayed
Record Payment section with Amount input (shows max balance), Reference input, Record Payment button
Payment recorded successfully
Balance and status updated correctly
Payment reference stored

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error when returning reconciliation with items after insert_many
bugs_fixed.fix: Added loop to remove _id from each item after insert_many

critical_code_review_comments: Minor accessibility issue: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby attribute for screen readers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Distributor Billing & Reconciliation module fully functional. Business logic verified: Stock transferred at Transfer Price = Base Price × (1 - 2.5%). Reconciliation calculates difference between provisional (transfer price) and actual (customer price). Negative difference generates Credit Note (Nyla owes distributor). Record Payment updates balance and status correctly.
